agents.name: Fundraising Intelligence
agents.description: Prepares pitch materials, analyzes funding readiness, connects to investor database. Assesses traction, team, and market size for Series A readiness.
agents.unlock_condition: Any app with revenue > $0 or 1000+ users
agents.first_output: Funding readiness assessment with top 3 actionable improvements

agents.name: Partnership Scout
agents.description: Identifies strategic partnership opportunities, drafts outreach templates, tracks partnership pipeline.
agents.unlock_condition: Apps with B2B or platform features
agents.first_output: Top 5 partnership targets with outreach scripts

agents.name: PR & Media Intelligence
agents.description: Drafts press releases, identifies relevant journalists, monitors brand mentions, generates story angles.
agents.first_output: Press release template + 5 journalist targets in your vertical

agents.name: Community Builder
agents.description: Designs community strategy, identifies where your users hang out, creates engagement playbooks.
agents.unlock_condition: Apps with social or collaborative features
agents.first_output: Community platform recommendation + launch week playbook

agents.name: Compliance Advisor
agents.description: GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2, HIPAA guidance. Generates compliance checklists and policy templates.
agents.unlock_condition: Apps with user data in regulated industries
agents.first_output: Compliance gap analysis for your app type

agents.name: Localization Engine
agents.description: Translates app UI, adapts for regional markets, identifies highest-value localization targets.
agents.unlock_condition: Apps with international traffic or i18n setup
agents.first_output: Top 3 markets to localize for based on your app type

agents.name: Data Intelligence
agents.description: Analyzes your product analytics, identifies drop-off points, recommends A/B tests.
agents.first_output: Funnel analysis and top 3 conversion opportunities

agents.name: Investor Relations
agents.description: Generates monthly investor updates, tracks metrics against targets, manages cap table context.
agents.unlock_condition: Apps with external investors or fundraising in progress
